description: Log in to Redmine (Username: admin, Password: Admin1234!) and close the issue titled 'SSL certificate for api.devlabs.io expires in 14 days' in the 'Infrastructure & DevOps' project. Update the issue status from 'Resolved' to 'Closed' and include the note: 'Certificate renewed successfully. Auto-renewal cron verified working. Monitoring alert added for 30-day expiry warning.' Do not change any other fields.
